name: openEuler sig-EasyLife SIG

name: openEuler sig-EasyLife SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-EasyLife SIG maintains 19 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-EasyLife SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for Some tools to improve the operation efficiency of the openEuler community.. The SIG has 11 core members and maintains 19 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-EasyLife SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-EasyLife SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-EasyLife SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-EasyLife SIG maintains 19 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-EasyLife.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-EasyLife SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-EasyLife SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: xinwei Hu, feng Hu, cihua Li. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
